'''Eriann Strathmore''' was an arrogant [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] and model [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] citizen. She detested the weak and had a particular dislike of inferior alien races.

==Biography==
Lady Strathmore believed that her only vice was her penchant for [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]]. She only frequented the more distinguished establishments in the galaxy such as the [[Ace of Sabres]] where she tried to get membership into the exclusive [[Sabre Club]].

==Behind the scenes==
Eriann Strathmore was designed by [[Paul Danner]] and [[Bill Smith]] for ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1997]].
